title: Listing Lifecycle (Create, Edit, Manage)
description: Full listing lifecycle: 5-step create wizard with photo upload, edit wizard with partial saves, dashboard management with status tabs, and listing actions (publish, sold, archive, duplicate, delete).

steps.title: Create Draft
steps.tooltip: Create empty draft listing

steps.title: Draft State
steps.tooltip: Listing in draft state — requires 2+ photos to publish. localStorage persistence for create wizard.

steps.title: Publish Listing
steps.tooltip: status=active, sets published_at. Visible in search, browse, shop page. Editable until sold.

steps.title: Mark as Sold
steps.tooltip: status=sold, sets sold_at (final state)

steps.title: Archive Listing
steps.tooltip: status=archived. Hidden from search. Kept for history. Can be reactivated.

steps.title: Reactivate Listing
steps.tooltip: status=active — reactivate archived listing

steps.title: Delete Draft
steps.tooltip: Hard delete (draft only)

steps.title: Create Draft
steps.tooltip: Empty draft created

steps.title: Upload Photos
steps.tooltip: Step 1: Photos — Sharp resize 1200x1200 max + 400x400 thumb. Stored as WebP in listing-images bucket.

steps.title: Select Category
steps.tooltip: Step 2: Category (10 options) + Condition (6 tiers)

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.tooltip: Step 3: title, brand, description, species, state, listing type

steps.title: Set Pricing
steps.tooltip: Step 4: Pricing (dollars stored as cents) + Shipping options

steps.title: Review Listing
steps.tooltip: Step 5: Preview all fields before publish

flows.title: Edit Listing
flows.trigger: Seller clicks Edit on a listing

steps.title: Prefill Wizard Data
steps.tooltip: GET /api/listings/[id] — pre-populate wizard

steps.title: Edit Listing Fields
steps.tooltip: Same 5-step wizard, tracks changedFields for partial save. No localStorage persistence.

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.tooltip: Only changed fields sent

steps.title: Manage Photos
steps.tooltip: Add new photos or delete existing. Remaining photos re-sequenced.

steps.title: Fetch Seller Listings
steps.tooltip: All listings, all statuses

steps.title: Filter by Status Tab
steps.tooltip: Tabs: Active, Drafts, Sold, Archived

steps.title: Active Actions
steps.tooltip: Edit, Mark Sold, Archive, Quick Edit Price, Duplicate

steps.title: View Watcher Count
steps.tooltip: QuickEditPrice modal displays listings.watcher_count as a demand signal. Denormalized by a DB trigger on the watchers table — no extra fetch needed. See member-watchlist.json for the watcher count trigger.

steps.title: Duplicate Listing
steps.tooltip: New draft with copied fields. Opens at Step 1 — needs photos.

steps.title: Draft Actions
steps.tooltip: Continue editing or delete draft (hard delete)

steps.title: Archived Actions
steps.tooltip: Reactivate → PATCH status=active
